diagrams.title: FIFO Page Replacement
diagrams.description: Shows FIFO algorithm with 3 frames and reference string 1,2,3,4,1,2
diagrams.purpose: Understand FIFO works like a queue, oldest (front) is replaced first

diagrams.title: LRU Page Replacement
diagrams.description: Shows LRU tracking page access timestamps for replacement decision
elements: Page table entries with access time/counter
Least recently used identified for replacement
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how LRU keeps track of recency of page usage

diagrams.title: Second Chance (Clock) Algorithm
diagrams.description: Circular buffer with reference bits scanned by clock hand
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Clock algorithm approximates LRU efficiently

diagrams.title: Belady's Anomaly Example
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how increasing frames can increase page faults in FIFO
diagrams.purpose: Show counterintuitive behavior of FIFO with more frames
